DA.equation: X ~= mean_curve + PCA_scores(C) @ PCA_loadings; each retained score is fit as a polynomial in concentration

UA.equation: X ~= mean_curve + PCA_scores(C) @ PCA_loadings; each retained score is fit as a polynomial in concentration
